hero.title: Manage your kindergarten
hero.subtitle: KinderHub is the all-in-one platform that helps kindergartens handle attendance, parent communication, staff management, and reporting — all in one place.

featuresSection.title: Everything you need
featuresSection.subtitle: Designed specifically for the needs of early childhood educators.

attendance.title: Attendance & Scheduling
attendance.desc: Track daily attendance, manage schedules, and get instant alerts for absences.

communication.title: Parent Communication
communication.desc: Keep parents informed with real-time updates, messages, and activity reports.

reports.title: Reports & Insights
reports.desc: Understand your school's performance with clear dashboards and exportable reports.

security.title: Safe & Secure
security.desc: GDPR-compliant data handling. Your children's data is always protected.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for small kindergartens just getting started.

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: For growing schools that need more power and flexibility.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For large schools or groups with multiple locations.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to simplify your kindergarten?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Join hundreds of schools already using KinderHub.
